lessons.title: What is Express? Installing and Setting Up
lessons.description: Meet Express, the most popular Node framework, and set up your first app.

lessons.title: Basic Routing (GET, POST, etc.)
lessons.description: Define routes for different HTTP methods and paths.

lessons.title: Route Parameters and Query Strings
lessons.description: Capture dynamic values from URLs and access query parameters.

lessons.title: Middleware – Concept and Built-in Middleware
lessons.description: Understand middleware and use built-in middleware like express.json().

lessons.title: Serving Static Files
lessons.description: Serve CSS, images, and other static assets with express.static.

lessons.title: Error Handling and 404
lessons.description: Handle 404 errors and create custom error handlers.
